title: erica conspicua subsp. conspicua
intro: Erica conspicua subsp. conspicua, also known as the bell heather, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Erica conspicua subsp. conspicua include its ability to aid in respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Erica conspicua subsp. conspicua include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
